narrative:
Madison Local Sd (Richland) school district has 14,471 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.0% D−R vs -14.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
